question: Q-onefield-vs-multiview-hardhop
kill_condition: hard4 recall@10 gain <= 0, or two-support recall@10 gain < -0.01
conjecture: On 2Wiki questions with four supporting passages, preserving anchor, evidence, and bridge scores as separate views until late readout beats an equal-compute single scalar without materially regressing two-support questions.
equal_compute_contract: Both arms consume the identical title-cosine, body-cosine, and n-ary APPNP bridge score matrices with the same query-only routing weights; only early scalar sum versus late reciprocal-rank readout differs.
